summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for BikerTechie corporate website updates. All major features including Services page, Training page, Google Cloud Partner integration, Contact page with Google Form, and WhatsApp floating button tested successfully across all pages.

ui_bugs.issue: Tooltip hover functionality blocked by overlay element (likely Emergent badge)
ui_bugs.impact: Minor UI interaction issue, tooltip exists but may not show on hover due to overlay interference

passed_tests: Home page loads with correct title and hero content
WhatsApp floating button visible and functional on all pages (Home, Services, Training, Contact, Careers)
WhatsApp button has correct URL with phone number and pre-filled message
Google Cloud Partner section prominently displayed on home page after hero
Google Cloud Partner badge visible in hero section
Navigation menu complete with all required items (Home, About, Services, Training, Careers, Contact)
Services page loads with comprehensive content for all services
All service sections present: AI Automation, Web Development, Cloud Consulting, Marketing, SEO
Training page loads with detailed course information
Training courses displayed: Cloud Foundations, Associate Cloud Engineer, Professional Cloud Architect, DevOps & Kubernetes, AI on Cloud, Corporate Training
Enrollment form functional with proper form fields and validation
Contact page loads with proper heading and layout
Google Form iframe properly embedded on Contact page
All pages maintain consistent WhatsApp button presence
Form filling functionality works (name, email, course selection)
Responsive design elements visible and properly styled
action_item_for_main_agent: Very minor: Consider adjusting WhatsApp button z-index to ensure tooltip shows above any overlay elements. Otherwise, website is production-ready and fully functional.
